arguments.argument:
event_inherited() bCanDealDamage=false bCanTakeDamage=false bInfected=0
//Enemy base statistics eName="Facility Cleaner Bot" eLevel=31 maxLife=530 life=maxLife pointWorth=49 atkPower=9 stunResist=6 resType[0]=2 baseItemChance=65 baseDropIndex=90 moneyWorth=5 initDir=0
runAcc=1.5 turnTime=0 shotTime=20 shotDelay=70 elecFrm=0 lineAlpha=0 bRockForm=0
bIsBoss=1 chaoText="Why is this called a Cleaner Bot? I guess that vacuum it creates to pull in the rocks is why, but still. It's just so weird, and why would a facility that isn't being used in a virtual world even need a bot that cleans?" devText="Nearly all the enemies in here are set up to be a fairly good nuisance to the player to encourage them to attempt to fight off the Injector Virus's from infecting bots."
deathAnim=0
myInfectSpot=instance_create(x,y,oInfectMe) myInfectSpot.myOwner=id
